title: Clever LMS Connect - API Reference
heading: Submissions
content:
## Submissions

The Submission Object Schema  

Property

Type

Description & Notes

Guaranteed

`id`

String (UUID)

UUID for submission. Used in API calls.  
_Example: 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000_

Y

`created`

Date

Resource creation date. ISO 8601 format in UTC time.

Y

`last_modified`

Date

Last time resource was updated. ISO 8601 format in UTC time.

Y

`state`

String

Submission state. Possible values: \["created", "submitted", "returned", "reclaimed"\]

Y

`flags`

List of submission flags

List of submission flags. Possible values: \["missing", "late", "excluded"\]. List can be empty.

N

`attachments`

Attachment Object

Latest submission attempt the assignee has made.

N

`grade_comment`

String

Optional comment for the submission, provided by the grader.

N

`grade_points`

Number

Submission's grade in numerical representation, if applicable.

N

`grade`

String

Submission's grade in string representation, if applicable.

N

`extra_attempts`

String

The number of extra attempts the assignee has for the submission beyond the assignment's max\_attempts.

N

`override_due_date`

Date

Indicates when an assignment submission is due for the associated assignee. Overrides the assignment due\_date.

N

`assignment_id`

UUID

UUID for assignment.

Y

`grader_id`

ObjectID

Globally unique and stable id for user assigned as grader for the submission.

N

`user_id`

ObjectID

Globally unique and stable id for user assigned to the submission.

Y

  
GET /sections/<section\_id>/assignments/<assignment\_id>/submissions (View Submissions)  
Returns the submissions for an assignment. Sample Request Body  
_(No Request Body for GET requests)_  
Sample Response  

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "created": "2024-11-06T23:28:07.532Z",
      "id": "e38e69a6-2239-4bab-987e-6fc7924d6a62",
      "state": "created",
      "user_id": "657b35c16a1a3e5c217dcd2e"
    },
    {
      "created": "2024-11-06T23:28:17.398Z",
      "id": "fad5435a-8cf4-4718-8332-8f0df90169bf",
      "state": "created",
      "user_id": "657b35c16a1a3e5c217dcd31"
    }
  ],
  "links": [
    {
      "rel": "self",
      "uri": "/v3.1/sections/657b35c16a1a3e5c217dcd72/assignments/c8f5eced-1ae1-45d9-97ce-0d4f6c0157d5/submissions"
    }
  ]
}
```

  
Required fields and values  

Parameter / Field

Location

Type

Notes

`section_id`

Path

String (ObjectID)

**Required.**

`assignment_id`

Path

String (UUID)

**Required.**

`limit`

Query

Number

Optional pagination parameter.

`starting_after`

Query

String

Optional pagination parameter.

`ending_before`

Query

String

Optional pagination parameter.

  
Unsupported fields  
_(None)_  
LMS-specific data quirks  

LMS

Behavior / Quirk

Notes

**Schoology**

Requires LTI SSO

🚧 Requires LTI SSO set up by the district and a successful LTI session by the end user.

  
GET /sections/<section\_id>/assignments/<assignment\_id>/submissions/<user\_id> (Get Submission)  
Returns a specific user's submission for an assignment. Sample Request Body  
_(No Request Body for GET requests)_  
Sample Response  

```json
{
  "data": {
    "created": "2024-11-06T23:28:07.532Z",
    "id": "e38e69a6-2239-4bab-987e-6fc7924d6a62",
    "state": "created",
    "user_id": "657b35c16a1a3e5c217dcd2e"
  }
}
```

  
Required fields and values  

Parameter / Field

Location

Type

Notes

`section_id`

Path

String (ObjectID)

**Required.**

`assignment_id`

Path

String (UUID)

**Required.**

`user_id`

Path

String (ObjectID)

**Required.**

  
Unsupported fields  
_(None)_  
LMS-specific data quirks  

LMS

Behavior / Quirk

Notes

**Schoology**

Requires LTI SSO

🚧 Requires LTI SSO set up by the district and a successful LTI session by the end user.

  
PATCH /sections/<section\_id>/assignments/<assignment\_id>/submissions/<user\_id> (Update Submission)  
Updates an existing submission of the specified assignment for a user. Sample Request Body  

```json
{
  "state": "submitted",
  "grade_comment": "test",
  "grade_points": 80,
  "grade": "B"
}
```

  
Sample Response  

```json
{
  "data": {
    "created": "2024-11-06T23:28:07.532Z",
    "grade_points": 80,
    "id": "e38e69a6-2239-4bab-987e-6fc7924d6a62",
    "state": "submitted",
    "user_id": "657b35c16a1a3e5c217dcd2e"
  }
}
```

  
Required fields and values  

Parameter / Field

Location

Type

Notes

`section_id`

Path

String (ObjectID)

**Required.**

`assignment_id`

Path

String (UUID)

**Required.**

`user_id`

Path

String (ObjectID)

**Required.**

`(Various Fields)`

Body

Mixed

Include one or more of: attachments, grader\_id, flags, grade\_comment, grade\_points, grade, extra\_attempts, override\_due\_date, state.

`flags`

Body

Array of Strings

Allowed values for flags: \["missing", "late", "excluded"\]

  
Unsupported fields  

LMS

Unsupported Fields

**Canvas**

`grade` (use `grade_points` instead), `state`, `override_due_date`, and `grader_id` (unless used for grade comments).

**Schoology**

`state`, `grader_id`, `grade`, `flags`, `extra_attempts`, `override_due_date`.

  
LMS-specific data quirks  

LMS

Behavior / Quirk

Notes

**Canvas**

`state` cannot be updated

Auto-updates to `submitted` if an attachment is included. The `returned` or `reclaimed` values are not supported.

**Canvas**

Draft assignments

You cannot update submissions if the assignment state is `draft` (Returns an `UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION` error).

**Canvas**

Empty `grade_comment`

Canvas ignores empty string values for the `grade_comment` field.

**Canvas**

Adding grade comments

Must include `grade`, `grade_comment`, and `grader_id`. If `grader_id` is missing, it defaults to "Monica Simo".

**Google Classroom**

Requires GCRI

🚧 Requires GCRI integration.

**Google Classroom**

Updating `state`

Must explicitly pass a `state` value to update it from `created`. Auto-updates to `submitted` if an attachment array is included.

**Google Classroom**

`due_date` not required

A teacher may remove it.

**Schoology**

Requires LTI SSO

🚧 Requires LTI SSO set up by the district and a successful LTI session.
